summary: Frontend-only mobile web testing executed on public preview. Species manual location fallback works on seeded data and keeps map visible, but the key result-screen save flow could not be completed in Expo web automation because image picker did not expose a file input/filechooser event.

ui_bugs.issue: Clicking 'Kig i fotoalbum' in Expo web preview produced no accessible file input in Playwright, blocking automated path to analyze/result/save.

integration_issues.flow: result -> Gem i min dyrebog -> species/[slug]
integration_issues.issue: Could not verify direct navigation after save because upload/analyze stage was not reachable in browser automation.
Not fully verified in this run due blocked save-flow reproduction and browser geolocation constraints.

react_native_issues.issue: Repeated warnings observed: 'shadow* style props are deprecated' and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated'.

action_items: Main agent should manually verify full flow on real device/browser: upload image -> analyze -> result -> tap 'Gem i min dyrebog' -> immediate navigation to species detail.
Harden saveCurrentFinding geolocation path: if reverse geocoding fails, continue saving finding without blocking save.
If web automation is required, add explicit web-testable upload hook/testID around image picker input path.
critical_code_review_comments: In AppContext.saveCurrentFinding, reverseGeocodeAsync is not guarded with try/catch; a geocoder failure can abort save instead of falling back to manual location entry.
frontend/lib/api.ts still uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL while project guideline expects EXPO_BACKEND_URL contract consistency.
seed_data_creation: Executed /app/tests/seed_ui_data.py with EXPO_BACKEND_URL=https://dyrfinder-dk.preview.emergentagent.com to validate species detail fallback using user natur-e2e-seed-001.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Playwright run could not traverse album picker in Expo web (`btn-kig-i-fotoalbum` did not create a file input). Species fallback path is testable via localStorage user `natur-e2e-seed-001` and route `/species/capreolus-capreolus`.
rca_of_issue: Primary blocker RCA: Expo image picker in this web preview did not expose filechooser/input to automation, so upload->analyze->result->save flow could not be reached. Functional validation completed for manual fallback on species detail using seeded finding data: municipality updates and map remains visible after unmatched geocode.
